raw_consumer_statement: On our tv we tried to sign up for one month of the XXXX and we were charged for the annual fee {$200.00} on XX/XX/year> instead of the XXXX month {$19.00} fee. I disputed XXXX the charge with Citi and they investigated for several months and eventually came back and ruled against me. I called XXXX directly and explained what had happened and they agreed to refund the full {$200.00}. XXXX sent an email approval which I sent to Citi after Citi did not provide a simple way to send it. They eventually received it which XXXX has acknowledged they received it and still Citi still has not agreed to credit the refund to my account- I am still waiting. They continually say they ruled in merchants favor saying it is closed. I opened a new dispute # XXXX. All I seek is the credit the merchant has agreed to pay {$200.00}. I have sent multiple correspondence to Citi including the XXXX refund approval to no avail. I will attach multiple files showing various correspondence and especially the XXXX approval for my refund. This should have been taken care of in a week or 2 and now it has been months.
